info.title: Pylontech OpenAPI
info.description: Pylontech Energy Storage System OpenAPI specification for partners to retrieve data and control devices.

tags.name: Telemetry Data
tags.description: Latest and historical telemetry data query

tags.name: Energy Statistics
tags.description: Energy statistics data aggregated by period (day/month/year)

get.description: Get list of all authorized sites, supports pagination

parameters.name: faultStatus
parameters.description: Filter by fault status: Normal, Fault

parameters.name: includeDevices
parameters.description: Whether to include device details, default true

post.description: Authorize specified site for current client access.

get.description: Get detailed information of specified site, including all devices under the site

parameters.name: includeDevices
parameters.description: Whether to include device details, default true

200.description: Site details and device list returned successfully

delete.description: Remove current client's access authorization to specified site

404.description: Site not found or not authorized

get.description: Get flattened list of all devices across all sites under current account, supports pagination and filtering. Convenient for VPP batch dispatch.

parameters.name: faultStatus
parameters.description: Filter by fault status: Normal, Fault

get.description: Get detailed information of specified device (static parameters)
Get site-level latest telemetry data, including meter readings and aggregated data

200.description: Site latest telemetry data returned successfully

post.summary: Batch get site latest telemetry data
post.description: Get the latest telemetry data for multiple sites.

sites.description: List of site IDs, up to 100 sites

200.description: Site latest telemetry data returned successfully
Device latest telemetry data returned successfully

post.summary: Batch get device latest telemetry data
post.description: Get the latest telemetry data for multiple devices.

devices.description: List of device SNs, up to 100 devices

200.description: Device latest telemetry data returned successfully

get.description: Get device historical telemetry data (maximum 30 days query)

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End time (ISO 8601 format, UTC), maximum 30 days query

200.description: Device historical telemetry data returned successfully

get.description: Get site energy data aggregated by period, for long-term trend analysis and reconciliation. Supports aggregation by day, month, year

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Statistics period: By day, By month, By year

parameters.name: includeDevices
parameters.description: Whether to include energy details for each device (default false to optimize performance)

get.description: Get device energy data aggregated by period. Supports aggregation by day, month, year

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Statistics period: By day, By month, By year

get.summary: Get device fault and alarm list
get.description: Get fault and alarm information of specified device, maximum 30 days, supports pagination
Get device command instruction history, kept for maximum 30 days

post.description: Send power dispatch command to single device

422.description: Instruction parameters exceed device capability range

post.description: Send the same power dispatch command to multiple devices and return a batch command ID for tracking or cancellation.

devices.description: List of device SNs, up to 100 devices

422.description: Instruction parameters exceed device capability range

put.description: Cancel executing or pending commands created by a batch command instruction.

409.description: Batch command already completed, cannot cancel

get.description: Query execution status of specified command instruction

put.description: Cancel executing or pending command instruction

get.description: Get the device's current recurring charge and discharge schedule.

404.description: No schedule is configured for the device

put.description: Configure the device's recurring charge and discharge schedule.

400.description: Parameter error, such as overlapping periods or an invalid SOC range

422.description: Strategy parameters exceed device capability range

post.description: Configure the same recurring charge and discharge schedule for multiple devices.

devices.description: List of device SNs, up to 100 devices

schedule.description: List of scheduled periods, with at least one period required

400.description: Parameter error, such as overlapping periods or an invalid SOC range

422.description: Strategy parameters exceed device capability range

get.description: Get device persistent configuration parameters (long-term effective settings such as operation mode)

put.description: Update device persistent configuration parameters. All fields are optional, only send parameters that need to be updated, unchanged parameters remain as is. Multiple parameters can be updated at once.

updated.description: List of fields updated this time

422.description: Parameter value exceeds device capability range

post.description: Update persistent configuration parameters for multiple devices. All configuration fields are optional; only send parameters that need to be updated.

devices.description: List of device SNs, up to 100 devices

setOperationMode.summary: Set operation mode for multiple devices

setMultipleParameters.summary: Set multiple parameters for multiple devices

updated.description: List of fields updated for this device

422.description: Parameter value exceeds device capability range

countryCode.description: Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2), such as CN, US, DE, JP

gridMeterId.description: Grid meter ID provided by utility company, e.g. NMI in Australia, MPRN in UK

gridConnectionPhaseType.description: Grid connection type: Single phase or Three phase

totalRatedPowerKw.description: Total rated active power of all inverters (kW)

totalMaxReactivePowerKvar.description: Total maximum reactive power (kvar, positive=export/inductive, negative=absorb/capacitive)

devices.description: List of devices under the site (returned when includeDevices=true)

DeviceListResponse.description: Device list response (flattened list of devices from all sites)

phaseType.description: Device phase type: Single phase or Three phase

batteryCapacityKwh.description: Battery installed capacity (kWh, energy storage devices only)

maxChargePowerKw.description: Maximum charge power (kW, energy storage devices only)

maxDischargePowerKw.description: Maximum discharge power (kW, energy storage devices only)

devices.description: Detailed telemetry data of all devices under the site

phaseBVoltageV.description: Phase B voltage (V, null for single-phase system)

phaseCVoltageV.description: Phase C voltage (V, null for single-phase system)

phaseBCurrentA.description: Phase B current (A, null for single-phase system)

phaseCCurrentA.description: Phase C current (A, null for single-phase system)

inverter.description: Inverter data (all device types have this)

battery.description: Battery data (battery inverter and hybrid inverter)

date.description: Date identifier. Format varies by period: day='2025-10-11', month='2025-10', year='2025'

devices.description: Energy data for each device (returned when includeDevices=true)

date.description: Date identifier. Format varies by period: day='2025-10-11', month='2025-10', year='2025'

endTime.description: Alarm resolution time (null when not resolved)

mode.description: Active power control mode: Battery constant power charge/discharge, Inverter AC side target active power, Grid export power limit, Grid import power limit
Reactive power control mode: Target reactive power, Fixed power factor
Active power control mode: Battery constant power charge/discharge, Inverter AC side target active power, Grid export power limit
Reactive power control mode: Target reactive power, Fixed power factor

status.description: Execution status: received=Received, executing=Executing, completed=Completed, cancelled=Cancelled

cancellReason.description: Cancellation reason: Manually cancelled, Time window overlap, Start time expired, Device fault, Not supported

DeviceSchedule.description: Device recurring charge and discharge schedule

schedule.description: List of scheduled periods, with at least one period required

SchedulePeriod.description: Recurring charge or discharge period configuration

startTime.description: Start time in HH:MM format, local time, 24-hour clock

endTime.description: End time in HH:MM format, local time, 24-hour clock

action.description: Action type: charge, discharge, or standby with no charging or discharging

targetBatteryPowerW.description: Target power in W. Discharging is positive and charging is negative.

daysOfWeek.description: Effective weekdays, where 1 is Monday and 7 is Sunday. Empty or null means every day.

DeviceConfiguration.description: Device persistent configuration (long-term effective settings). GET interface returns complete configuration, PUT interface for update all fields are optional, only send parameters that need to be updated.

operationMode.description: Operation mode: Self-consumption, Feed-in priority, Backup mode

chargeCutoffSocPercent.description: Charge Maximum SOC Limit (%), will not charge exceed this value

dischargeCutoffSocPercent.description: Discharge Minimum SOC Limit (%), will not discharge below this value
